title: Carmen C81103COP Noir II Lightweight Hair Dryer with Cool Shot, Concentrator Nozzle, Removable Filter, 1800W, Black and Copper
features: FAST, FLAWLESS STYLING: Powerful 1800W performance takes hair from wet to dry in no time
3 HEAT & 2 SPEED SETTINGS: Whatever your hair type or style, there’s a heat and speed setting that’s just right for you to help you achieve a result
SLIM CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE: You can direct air flow to precisely where you want it and be left with beautifully, dry, smooth hair
INTEGRATED REAR MIRROR: 1x normal view offers you a distortion free image of your whole face while styling
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional Carmen quality with a 3-year extended guarantee
description: Blow dry your hair with a fast, flawless finish using the powerful Carmen Noir II hair dryer. Showcasing a sleek black and copper design, the lightweight accessory adds style and comfort to your hair-care routine. It features three heat and two speed settings suitable for styling hair of any length or thickness, with a cool temperature setting included to help secure your style in place for a longer-lasting blow dry. The slim concentrator nozzle attachment directs hot air onto sectioned hair to help you create a defined look. A removable filter is included to easily dispose of caught hairs and lint to maintain drying performance. Featuring a rear mirror to check your look at any time, the Carmen Noir II dryer is an all-in-one accessory for professionally styling your hair.
